item.title: KERNN v1 - Building A General Feed Forward Neural Network Accelerator
Supermic+more: PDM Bitstream ASICs for Audio Signal Processing
item.description: PDM microphones have remarkable properties for beamforming. By manipulating the bitstream directly at 3072 kHz rather than converting to PCM first, delay-and-sum beamforming becomes simpler and more precise. This project implements these operations as ASICs using the Skywater 130nm CMOS process, with eight designs submitted for fabrication.

item.title: clEar: Glasses-Based Beamforming Hearing Aids
item.description: clEar is a glasses-based beamforming hearing aid that uses Golomb-spaced microphone arrays, a custom MSMVDR beamforming technique, and a hybrid multi-speaker tracking algorithm to achieve a 71% increase in STOI and 9.9 dB SNR improvement. ISEF Grand Award, CSEF First Place.

item.title: How It's Made
item.description: Everyone who can, should make a personal website. So here's how I made mine.
